---
title: "Kiely Hine"
---

*Geospatial Analysis · Hydrology · Environmental Data Workflows*

I am a geospatial analyst with a background in geoscience and geography, focused on using GIS and data-driven methods to better understand environmental systems. My work brings together spatial analysis, hydrologic thinking, and reproducible workflows to turn complex environmental data into clear, useful insight.

---

## What This Site Highlights

This portfolio brings together selected work in GIS, hydrology, and environmental analysis, with an emphasis on watershed-scale questions, spatial workflows, and communication through maps and applied geospatial products.

---

## Featured Project

### Temporal Analysis of Flood Timing and Seasonality

A geospatial and statistical workflow developed to examine how flood timing and seasonal behavior have shifted across Mid-Atlantic watersheds over multiple decades.

[Explore the project](projects.qmd)

---

## Core Strengths

- geospatial data integration and analysis  
- environmental data pipelines  
- spatial-temporal analysis  
- hydrologic and watershed-based analysis  
- map design and technical communication  

---

## Tools I Work With

ArcGIS Pro · R · Spatial Analysis · Environmental Data · GitHub · Quarto
